rationale: For an Enterprise HR & Field Agent App (NBFC-MFI), we need authority, absolute clarity, and functional aesthetics. The field agents need high contrast for outdoor visibility (Light theme), while the corporate navy and vibrant orange provide a perfect high-contrast Swiss-style execution. No generic SaaS look; pure structural efficiency.

primary.description: Radhya Orange - used strictly for primary CTAs, active states, map markers, and critical actions. Never use as a background.

brand_navy.description: Deep Navy - used for primary headings, sidebars, and strong structural borders.

layout_and_spacing.shadows: shadow-sm for default state, shadow-md for hover state. Use pure CSS borders for definition instead of heavy blurs.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: bg-brand_navy text-white fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 flex-col border-r border-brand_navy-dark
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all data grids and tables. Optical centering for icons.
layout_and_spacing.mobile_first: Ensure all views collapse to a single column on mobile. Field agent dashboard must prioritize the 'Mark Attendance' CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E85B1E] text-white hover:bg-[#D04A15] font-semibold px-6 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#1E2A47] text-[#1E2A47] hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium px-6 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-secondary hover:text-primary hover:bg-slate-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

cards.style: bg-white border border-border rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden

inputs.style: border border-slate-300 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E85B1E] focus:border-transparent transition-all w-full

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle -translate-y-[2px] on interactive cards. Background tint change on list items.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use skeleton loaders with pulse animation (bg-slate-200) instead of generic spinners for tables/widgets.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #E85B1E and #1E2A47 meets APCA standards. All interactive elements must have clear focus states (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2).
accessibility.testing: MANDATORY: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

image_urls.description: Office workers collaborating - use for Employee Directory hero banner or HR Dashboard empty state background.
Abstract navy and orange geometric background - use for the split-screen Login page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Outfit' and 'Work Sans' fonts from Google Fonts in index.html.
Use Shadcn UI for standard components (Tables, Dialogs, Dropdowns, DatePicker).
Strictly follow the color scheme. Do not introduce generic blues or greens unless for success/error states.
Ensure all data-heavy views (Payroll, Attendance) use the 'Control Room' grid layout.
For the mobile view (Field Agents), ensure tap targets are at least 48x48px and attendance marking (selfie) is front and center on their dashboard.
MANDATORY: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, form inputs, and key UI elements for E2E testing.
